specific_mechanism: Sharks detect prey-generated electric fields via ampullae of Lorenzini — gel-filled canals that act as voltmeters at nanovolt sensitivity
llm_application: LLM 'electroreception' for adversarial prompt detection: gel-canal analog = subtle activation-pattern detector that fires on injection attempts at nanovolt-equivalent statistical sensitivity.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes marine-biology basin-stability mapping as proposed.
